behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names both files (components/notification/PurePanel.tsx and components/notification/style/index.ts) that tests inspect.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the symptom and expected behavior without specifying the conditional rendering or CSS changes needed.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_description_spacing_without_title requires either &:first-child with margin OR both marginInlineEnd AND marginRight; a valid alternative fix using only padding, or using a different selector like :not(:has(title)), would fail. Also test_title_conditional_rendering only accepts specific patterns like 'title && (' or 'title ? ('—a fix using early-return or extracting to a variable like 'const titleNode = title ? <div/> : null' would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All f2p tests are regex/string checks on source file contents (fs.readFileSync then regex matching) — none execute the component or render the notification to verify the overlap is actually fixed.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests check for specific pattern changes that wouldn't exist in an unfixed/stub version.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover conditional title rendering and description spacing as described in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are organized into named classes like TestConditionalTitleRendering, TestDescriptionSpacing, TestLayoutBehavior with docstrings.

no_typos.reason: File paths and names appear correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the two files but doesn't point to specific lines; file localization is reasonable given the domain.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits task.
